positive_prompt: Minecraft landscape panorama, blocky terrain; pixelated forests, mountains, rivers, and villages; voxel-style characters, torches, wooden structures; bright daylight, clear sky, vibrant colors, playful, stylized, high-detail
negative_prompt: blur/low-res/artifacts, oversaturation, cartoon/3d-render look, duplicates, floating objects
verification_prompt: minecraft style, Minecraft landscape panorama, blocky terrain, sharp, photoreal, no blur, no oversaturation, no duplicates, no floating objects
